name: Shenlong
title: Dragon's Breath

abilities.name: Combat Finesse
abilities.text: When this model is targeted with a (melee) action, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: Master of the Five Temples
abilities.text: When this model activates, discard all Fighting Style upgrades attached to it. Then, this model may attach a Fighting Style upgrade.

abilities.name: Sacred Ink
abilities.text: When this model would gain an enemy token, it may remove a Chi token instead.

actions.name: Fury of the Dawn
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action ignores (warding) abilities. This model gains a Chi token.

triggers.name: Power Now, Pain Later
triggers.text: Once per turn. Immediately, until the end of this model's activation, it receives one additional raise while resolving actions. When it ends its activation, it is dealt 3 irreducible damage.

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

actions.name: The Dragon's Light
actions.effects: Enemy models in the area between this model and the target are dealt 1 damage. Then, resolve one of the following:

triggers.name: Inferno Surge
triggers.text: Enemy models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Surging Force
triggers.text: Allies in the area between this model and the target gain a Hastened token.

triggers.name: Healing Wave
triggers.text: Allies in the area between this model and the target gain a Balm token.

actions.name: Dragon's Advance
actions.effects: Move this model up to 6". This model may remove a Chi token from itself to ignore models and terrain while moving.

extraction_notes: The Dragon's Light action has three options listed (Inferno Surge, Surging Force, Healing Wave) formatted as sub-abilities rather than traditional triggers. These lack suit icons and appear to be choices within the action's resolution. I have parsed them as triggers without suits, though they function more as resolution options.
